name: Michael Cain
abstract: Michael Cain (born April 2, 1966) is a pianist and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: My association with Michael Cain was a highly creative one... I had this group together... Michael Cain joins the group on keyboards.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
